description:
RAG and chatbots hog all the limelight when it comes to Agentic AI conversations. But almost no one's talking about the biggest Agentic AI opportunity inside the enterprise.  

Sachin Panicker calls it out directly: 
Organizational Memory. 
Every enterprise is sitting on decades of knowledge: 

• People who left 5, 10, 15 years ago
• Tribal knowledge stored in heads, not systems
• Broken documentation trails
• Meeting notes lost across turnover
• Processes understood by one person, not the org

Today, every exit is an unintentional knowledge purge. 

Sachin’s point: 
This is where Agentic AI becomes transformative, not in glamorous demos, but in retaining institutional memory across generations of employees. 

Imagine agents that: 
• Remember every decision ever made
• Track reasoning across people and time
• Preserve insights beyond attrition
• Connect historical dots humans won’t
• Maintain continuity even as teams change

This is the unsexy use case. 
The one no vendor markets. 
But the one that will quietly reshape enterprise competitiveness. 

Sachin spells out a future change most teams aren’t planning for but probably should be. 

Watch below. 
Explore FD Ryze → https://bit.ly/3NlT5Cw 

#AgenticAI #EnterpriseAI #KnowledgeManagement #FutureOfWork #FDryze 

Malavika Nair
